titles.title: Sanctuary/Blessed Be the Name of the Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord prepare me To be a sanctuary Pure and holy Tried and true And with thanksgiving I'll be a living Sanctuary, oh for You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Blessed be the name of the Lord, He is worthy to be praise and adored; So we lift up holy hands in one accord, Singing, Blessed be the name, blessed be the name, Blessed be the name of the Lord?!
